folio.label: 53v
folio.l: For oft tyme he fond , his box ful bare

note.notetxt: 26The colour of ink is light brown in this folio.ODR

folio.l: For sothly , a Prentys a Reuelour
That hauntetú Dys , riot , & Paramour
His maister shal it , in his shoppe a bye
Al haue he no part , of the Mynstralsye
For theft and riot , they ben conuertible
Al can he pleye , on gyterne or ribible
Reuel and trouthe , as in a lowe degre
They ben ful wrothe , al day , as men may se
¢ This ioly Prentis , with his maister stode
Til he was ny , out of his Prentyshode
Al were he snybbed , bothe erly and late
And somtyme lad , w reuel to Newgate
But at the last , his Maister hi~ bythougút
Vp on a day , whan he his paper sougút
Of a prouerbe , that seith this same word
Wel bet is roten Appel , out of hord
Than that he rote , al the remenaunt
So faretú it , by a riotous seruaunt
It is ful lasse harm , to late hi~ passe
Than he shende alle , the seruutes in the place
Therfore his Maister , ©af hi~ acquietance
And bad hi~ go , w sorwe , & witú meschaunce
And thus this ioly Prentys , had his leue
Now late hi~ riote , al the nygút , or leue
And for there nys no thef , with oute a louke
That helpetú hi~ , to wasten and to souke
Of that he bribe can , or borwe may
A non he sent his bed , and his array
Vn to a Compere , of his owen sorte
That loued Dys , ryot and desporte
And had a wyf , æat held for countenaunce
A Shoppe , and swyued for hire sustenaunce
